hero.headline: The electrician Columbus calls *when it matters*
hero.subheadline: 100-year-old wiring? Dead outlets? EV charger install? Jim shows up, figures it out, and gets it working right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From century-old rewiring to modern EV chargers — no job too tricky

services.title: Outlet Repairs & Installation
services.description: Dead outlets that haven't worked in decades? We track down the problem and get them running again, plus add new ones where you need them.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Fuse Box Replacement
services.description: Old fuse boxes upgraded to modern breaker panels. Keep you in contact throughout the process so you know exactly when to expect us.

services.title: Light Fixture Installation & Repair
services.description: Tricky lighting issues solved. Whether it's new fixtures or getting existing ones working properly in older homes.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Home electric vehicle charger setup done right. Show up as promised, reasonable rates, and quality installation you can count on.

services.title: Home Rewiring Projects
services.description: Challenging wiring work in century-old homes. We figure out what previous electricians couldn't and make it work safely.

about.heading: Jim Hartley — Columbus Electrician Since Day One
about.body: When your neighbors need electrical work done right, they call Jim. Over 75 five-star reviews from Columbus homeowners who've learned what reliable electrical service actually looks like. No waiting weeks for an appointment. No trying to upsell you on work you don't need. Just honest electrical work that solves the problem.

reviews.name: Elana O.
reviews.text: Finally found a reliable and honest electrician! Jim replaced light fixtures and helped with rewiring. Very professional and pleasant to work with.

reviews.name: Wayne H.
reviews.text: James installed our EV charger perfectly. Showed up exactly when promised and his rates were very reasonable. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jenn
reviews.text: Jim upgraded our old fuse box to breakers. Kept us informed throughout, quality work at a fair price. Will definitely call him again.

reviews.name: Jessie A.
reviews.text: Jim has handled 3 different projects for us over the years. Always available quickly, never tries to upsell us on unnecessary work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local electrician covering the communities that know us best

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work handled right?
cta.body: Call Jim directly or request a quote. No waiting weeks, no pushy sales tactics — just reliable electrical service from Columbus's trusted electrician.
